title: notholaena revoluta
intro: Notholaena revoluta, also known as the Mountain Fern or Rock Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Notholaena revoluta include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling its leaves in water, which is then used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
